evidence_quotes.quote: introducing subscriptions where they did not exist before.
terms of service to be changed at any time
Please support initiatives like the right to repair
Visa and Mastercard have both showed that both of them have the power to restrict sales of products that are legal

paragraphs.text: Hello I m a Greek citizen and the digital space keeps getting more dystopian , consumer unfriendly as well as companies restricting our rights. Purchase used to mean you would own the thing you rightfully spent, your hard earned money on just for now in the current age those rights to be removed or the terms of service to be changed at any time from the companies, with the consumer having little to no options/ compensations when this happens. This keeps happening on a lot of industries from the smart home industries to digital entertainment industries, we keep seeing companies rob people of what they paid for because its not lucrative for them anymore. Instead of the companies striving to innovate to deliver new products to the consumers to make new profit they rely on underhanded tactics such as introducing subscriptions where they did not exist before. We ve seen this happen with companies like Sony, futurehome, Fulu, adobe , Ubisoft and many more (including car manufacturers). That's why i support movements like Stop Destroying Videogames , but my problem with that it is only striving to fix one industry the videogame industry, don't get me wrong i want this initiative to succeed, but i d like initiatives likes this would happen in other industries as well, i d like for the digital space to heal from predatory companies and give more power back to the consumer. To further my point lately Visa and Mastercard have both showed that both of them have the power to restrict sales of products that are legal, that shows that you don't really own the money as you cannot spend them how the consumer chooses to, who knows how much they ll abuse this power just like how companies have already started abusing the digital space with products that you don't own. I beg of you give power back to the people and don't protect the predatory companies , give power back to the democracy and not the companies. If not i m afraid that human rights will be just getting reduced , i don't want to live in a dystopia such as "you will own nothing and be happy" , isn't it right for the people to use/ repair/ modify the products they paid for without worrying about being criminally charged, or getting their right to use them revoked? Please support initiatives like the right to repair , and Stop killing videogames as i see them being the first steps to healing the digital space
